name: Credit Card Processing - Merchant Services
description_short: NLR Resources is a consulting firm specializing in electronic payment solutions and merchant services, helping businesses evaluate and optimize their payment processing options.
description_long:
NLR Resources Inc., based in Santa Margarita, California, is a consulting group that has positioned itself as an expert advisor in electronic payment solutions for businesses. The company was founded to help organizations navigate the complex landscape of payment processing options and merchant services, serving as an intermediary between businesses and acquiring partners.

The company's core service offering includes credit and debit card processing, ACH/E-Check acceptance, e-commerce payment solutions, mobile processing, recurring billing, and IVR payment systems. They specialize in retail merchant accounts, off-shore merchant accounts across multiple regions (Caribbean, Canada, Central America, South America, European Union, and Southeast Asia), and tailored solutions for specific industry segments including insurance, travel, nonprofits, property management, and home-based startups. NLR Resources also operates a partner program that allows other companies to white-label or integrate their payment processing capabilities.

What distinguishes NLR Resources is their consulting-focused approach rather than direct processing. They leverage an expansive network of acquiring partners to find solutions matched to individual business needs, with particular expertise in off-shore and international payment processing. The company has established partnerships with technology platforms like Elafris and Xemplar Insights to integrate payment processing into broader business solutions. Their partner program offers flexible revenue-sharing arrangements and multiple domestic and offshore bank options.

However, as a consultant/reseller model rather than a direct processor, NLR Resources does not appear to provide transparent pricing, underwriting criteria, or service level guarantees on their website. The company relies on referral-based contact (phone/email) for quotes rather than published rates. There is limited independent third-party verification of their track record, and as a consulting intermediary, clients ultimately depend on the acquiring partners NLR selects.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specializes in off-shore and international merchant accounts across multiple continents
Offers tailored solutions for niche industries (insurance, nonprofits, property management, startups)
Provides consulting evaluation of existing merchant accounts before recommending changes
White-label partner program allows other businesses to resell their services with flexible revenue sharing
Expertise in multiple payment methods beyond card processing (ACH, E-Check, IVR, recurring billing, mobile)
Works with clients of all sizes and transaction volumes
Professional consulting team can handle sales and customer outreach for partners
cons: No transparent pricing, rates, or fee structures published on website—requires contacting for quotes
As a consultant/reseller, not a direct processor, so customer service and support depends on underlying acquiring partners
No published service level agreements, uptime guarantees, or dispute resolution procedures
Limited third-party reviews or independent verification of claims and service quality
Typical lag time for setup since solutions must be sourced through partner network rather than offered directly
best_for: Businesses operating internationally or in offshore jurisdictions seeking merchant accounts
Niche industries (insurance, nonprofits, travel, property management) needing specialized payment solutions
E-commerce and mobile businesses seeking integrated payment technology consulting
Resellers and partners looking to white-label payment processing services with revenue sharing
diagnosis: NLR Resources is best for businesses seeking specialized payment processing consulting, particularly those operating internationally, in niche industries, or requiring solutions beyond standard card processing. The main caveat is that they operate as a consulting intermediary/reseller rather than a direct processor, so customers depend on their partner selection, and there is no published pricing or service guarantees on their website.
services: Credit and debit card processing consulting and setup
Off-shore merchant accounts (Caribbean, Canada, Central America, South America, EU, Southeast Asia)
Industry-specific payment solutions (insurance, nonprofits, property management)
White-label partner program with revenue sharing
Sales and customer outreach services for partners
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 22362 Gilberto Suite 200, Rancho Santa Margarita, CA 92688
